title: Swap WBTC - Open App
meta_description: swap wbtc through Uniswap with WBTC preselected, a direct app route, and clear checks before you connect a wallet or sign.
hero_h2: Trade wrapped Bitcoin on Ethereum through Uniswap
hero_lead: swap wbtc through the official Uniswap app with Wrapped Bitcoin preselected on Ethereum so you can review the route, price impact, wallet approval, gas, and final quote before signing.
what_is: Uniswap is a self-custody app destination for trading ERC-20 assets directly from a connected wallet. WBTC is Wrapped Bitcoin on Ethereum, and its token contract can be checked on Etherscan.

how.d: Use the app link to open Uniswap with WBTC already selected as the output token.
Connect a compatible self-custody wallet and confirm you are using Ethereum mainnet.
Select ETH or another ERC-20 token, enter the amount, and verify the WBTC contract address.
Check the quote, route, price impact, gas, and any token approval before confirming in your wallet.

points.p: The page is built to send users to the official Uniswap interface, using documented custom link parameters for prefilled swap flows.
WBTC uses the Ethereum token contract 0x2260FAC5E5542a773Aa44fBCfeDf7C193bc2C599; verify the address before approving or signing.
This landing page never takes deposits, custody, seed phrases, or private keys; the transaction is reviewed and signed from your wallet in the app.

faq.a: You can use the direct Uniswap app route on this page, then confirm the token, route, and final wallet transaction inside the official interface.

faq.q: Is swap wbtc the same as wrapping BTC?
faq.a: No. A market trade exchanges one token for WBTC, while wrapping or redeeming BTC involves the WBTC mint and burn process described in the WBTC whitepaper.

faq.q: What network should I use to swap wbtc?
faq.a: This route is for WBTC on Ethereum mainnet. Always check the network and token address before approving a transaction.

faq.q: Why verify the contract before I swap wbtc?
faq.a: Token symbols can be copied by unrelated contracts, so the Ethereum WBTC address should match 0x2260FAC5E5542a773Aa44fBCfeDf7C193bc2C599.

faq.q: Does this page charge fees to swap wbtc?
faq.a: No. This page is only a routing page; network gas, pool fees, price impact, and any app-displayed costs are shown in the swap interface before signing.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify app.uniswap.org before connecting a wallet; educational only, not financial advice.
